issue.title: [server] Remove HttpSession from auth flow and adopt silent login
issue.goal: Grill log item: convert the authentication stack to a stateless JWT flow. Remove HttpSession reads/writes from JwtAuthenticationFilter, AuthService, and OAuth2SuccessHandler; keep OAuth2 success on a silent-login path that sets only the refresh-token cookie and redirects; ensure access tokens are obtained after redirect via reissue. Acceptance: no auth-token session storage remains, OAuth2 login works without server-side session token state, and verification evidence is recorded.
acceptanceCriteria: The issue "[server] Remove HttpSession from auth flow and adopt silent login" is resolved.

description: Grill log item: convert the authentication stack to a stateless JWT flow.
